strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and other modern frameworks
Proven track record in optimizing performance, scalability, and user experience in high-traffic systems
Deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP integration
concerns: Limited recent experience with primary backend frameworks like Nest.js
Primary stack experience leans heavier on Node.js than Kotlin/Java for backend services
Secondary technologies (e.g., Kotlin/Java) are not prominently featured in recent roles
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, complemented by significant experience in AI-agent infrastructure. However, his recent backend work lacks depth in Nest.js and Kotlin/Java, which are critical for this role. His background in architecture, performance optimization, and collaborative development practices aligns well with the requirements, but the gap in primary backend technologies may require additional validation.
